data.body: Main stabilized (migration steps 2-5 landed incl c4441f756 de-flake of test_warm_resolution_is_cheap — the perf flake that failed 653; submit-type still FFO, cutover 03c6 pending). Rebased 6-stack onto stable tip 560180461 (clean), re-pushed (updated 6). CI re-running with all de-flakes+integration fix in base. Awaiting green to Submit before main moves again (plain Gerrit Submit per ADR 0047).
